title: Attorney Websites
content: Website designs I built for three law firms, each covering a different practice area. Each site needed clear navigation, strong contact paths, and copy-forward layouts — law clients read before they call. These are only a few samples of the vast number of websites I created.

images.caption: Greenspan & Greenspan Website: Personal injury, DWI, and tax law firm in New York. Hero image, practice area icons, and a header built around getting someone on the phone fast.

Robert G. Stahl, LLC Website: Criminal defense firm focused on white-collar and internet crimes, with offices in New Jersey and New York. Navigation covers practice areas, firm background, and media coverage.

Robert G. Smith, PLLC Website: Divorce and family law firm in New York, also covering paternity and criminal defense. Free consultation number in the header, testimonials, and a sidebar linking out to specific practice areas.
